name: Tofu South of the Border Enchiladas
recipeIngredient: 12 oz silken firm tofu, drained and mashed
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F.
2. Lightly spray a 9" x 13-inch baking pan with no-stick vegetable spray.
3. In a bowl, combine all ingredients except tortillas, tomato salsa, and cheese.
4. Place 1/2 cup of mixture in the center of each tortilla and roll up.
5. Place enchiladas in the baking dish, seam side down.
6. Pour tomato salsa over the enchiladas.
7. Sprinkle shredded cheese on top.
8. Cover pan with aluminum foil and bake for 35-40 minutes.
